title: Conflict of laws
doc_html:
§2213. Conflict of laws

            In the event of any conflict of the provisions of this Chapter with federal laws or regulations, the federal laws and regulations shall prevail.

            Acts 2015, No. 426, §2.
doc_text:
§2213.  Conflict of laws
In the event of any conflict of the provisions of this Chapter with federal laws or
regulations, the federal laws and regulations shall prevail.
Acts 2015, No. 426, §2.
